title: Christmas in the Summer Sun of Australia
passage:
You see people in movies have a white Christmas in England or the United States, but Christmas in Australia is very different.

Christmas (December 25th) comes at the hottest time of the year in Australia. The temperature can be over 40°C in some cities! Because it is so hot, people usually have lunch outside and swim in the pool during Christmas. They also meet all of their family for Christmas lunch. Christmas lunch is usually a big meal with ham, turkey, salad and seafood. Family members all cook something different to bring to the feast(大餐). One year my aunt even made a gingerbread house(姜饼屋) that we ate for dessert!

The sport of cricket(板球) is very popular in Australia. So during Christmas, family members also play a game of cricket in the backyard(后院). Australia might not have a white Christmas, but it is still a very exciting and fun time of the year.

questions.prompt: What color is Christmas in movies in England or the United States?
Why is Christmas in Australia different?
options: It comes at the hottest time of the year.
Because it comes at the hottest time of the year.

questions.prompt: What do people in Australia often do during Christmas?
options: Play cricket in backyards and swim in pools.

questions.prompt: Do you like Christmas in Australia? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: Yes, I would love to experience Christmas in Australia because it is unique.
Because having an outdoor feast and swimming in a pool on Christmas day sounds like great fun.
It would be an unforgettable holiday experience compared to a traditional cold Christmas.
No, I don't want to spend Christmas in Australia because it's too hot.
Because I prefer making snowmen and wearing warm clothes on this holiday.
In conclusion, a traditional snowy Christmas is much more romantic and beautiful.
